name: Consulting Services Agreement
description: A contractor agreement for independent consultants. Defines deliverables, payment rates, and intellectual property terms for short-term project engagements.
content:
CONSULTING SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Consulting Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}}

Between:
{{client_name}} ("Client")
And:
{{consultant_name}} ("Consultant")

1. ENGAGEMENT
Consultant agrees to provide consulting services as described in Exhibit A attached hereto.

2. COMPENSATION
Rate: {{hourly_rate}} per hour
Maximum Hours: {{max_hours}} hours per week
Payment Terms: Net {{payment_terms_days}} days

3. EXPENSES
Pre-approved expenses up to {{expense_limit}} per month will be reimbursed.

4. DELIVERABLES
{{deliverable_1}}
{{deliverable_2}}
{{deliverable_3}}
Delivery Date: {{delivery_date}}

5. INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR STATUS
Consultant is an independent contractor and not an employee of Client.

6. NON-SOLICITATION
Consultant agrees not to solicit Client employees for {{non_solicit_months}} months following termination.

7. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate with {{notice_days}} days written notice.

8. GOVERNING LAW
{{governing_state}}
